calendar.matters:
CHANGE OF NAME FOR MINOR REY ANTONIO ALEXANDER BONILLA
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Petitioner Melissa Bonilla and minor child.

Dept.505; Judge: Samuel K Feng; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42 am and concluding at 9:43 am.

Petitioner Milissa Bonilla not appearing.
Respondent Josue Bonilla is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

The Court called petitioner prior to the calling of the matter, Petitioner did not answer the phone.

No appearance being made by the petitioner Melissa Bonilla, and with an objection to the name change being made by respondent Josue Bonilla, the matter is taken off calendar and the petition is dismissed without prejudice. (D505)
